title: Uzbek Minecraft
body:
Uzbek Minecraft Resourse Pack 1.21 versiya uchun
Resourse Packni o'rnatgandan keyin Minecraftni Resourse Packiga qo'yasiz keyin esa **Language** yoki **язык** ga kirib pastroqdan Uzbek (Adabiy) tilga qoyasiz va Uzbekcha Minecraft tayyor
Bu Resourse Pack hozircha faqat menyularni Uzbek tiliga tarjima qilyabdi kelajakda minecraft ichidagi narsalar, asboblar, yutuqlar va boshqa narsalarni ham tarjima qilib beradi
#                 Agar minecraftga kirganda uzbek tili bolmasa yana qaytadan **Language** yoki **язык**ga kirib qo'yish kerak bo'lsa bu muammoni yechimi bor
 **WINDOWS + R** bosib **%appdata%** yozing keyin OK bosing
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa8adf7c2419f9d71f62735c2bf05d50db2947b.png)

Keyin **.minecraft** faylini topib ichiga kirilar
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/308e4a947ff609f958b48783f41854466879c786.png)

Keyin pastroqdan **options.txt** ni topib ichiga **notepad** yoki **блокнот** orqali kirilar
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80394dcdedf85f7cd71688ecf98b7748045d3fa1.png)

Keyin esa pastroqdan **lang**ni **uz_uz** qib qoyilar
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/472093b54e1052ec4b8d83fae4bcba7d329d88ff.png)

Bo'ldi MINECRAFTga kirganlaringda til uzbekcha bo'ladi
